reviews.comment: I am a regular at Coffee island and I love the vibe of this place! It's refreshing and crisp , and their coffees are good. I feel there's scope for variety and improvement in food. For people who have dietary restrictions they could add few options. Most of the times many of the options are unavailable. Improving that will make a lot of difference in the overall experience at this otherwise lovely coffee place!!

reviewReply.comment: Lovely to know you enjoy the vibe and our coffees and it means a lot coming from a regular visitor. Your thoughts on adding more variety, dietary-friendly options, and strengthening availability have been noted and shared with our team. Feedback like yours truly helps us refine the overall experience. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon. ☕✨
